name: Celsion Corporation
summary: Celsion Corporation, a clinical stage biotechnology company, focuses on the development and commercialization of directed chemotherapies, DNA-mediated immunotherapy, and vaccines. Its lead product candidate is ThermoDox, a liposomal encapsulation of doxorubicin, which is in Phase III clinical trial for the treatment of primary liver cancer. The company is also developing GEN-1, a DNA-based immunotherapeutic product, which is in Phase II clinical trials for the localized treatment of ovarian cancers. Celsion Corporation was founded in 1982 and is based in Lawrenceville, New Jersey.
